---
name: 📦 New Profile Proposal
about: Propose a new project type profile (ML, education, medicine, etc.)
title: '[PROFILE] '
labels: enhancement, profile
---

## Profile name

e.g. `ml-research`, `education`, `medical-research`, `iot-firmware`

## Target use case

One paragraph: who is this for, what kind of projects.

## Differences from base template

What needs to be added/changed:
- Additional dependencies in `pyproject.toml`?
- Extra Docker services (Redis, Clickhouse, MinIO)?
- Specific MCP servers?
- Domain-specific skills?
- Regulatory considerations (e.g. HIPAA, GDPR, FDA)?

## Prior art

Existing GitHub projects in this domain that should be referenced/forked.

## Are you willing to maintain it?

Profiles need someone to update them as ecosystem evolves. Yes/No/Maybe with help.
